raw.message:
Mesure‑toi à nos 700 000 joueurs ! 🤩
Quel que soit ton niveau, viens défier les plus de 700 000 joueurs qui jouent déjà chez nous !

hook.summary: Rapidly counting numbers and stylized character avatars highlighting a large player base.
hook.visual_action: Numbers count up to 700,000 while animated poker player avatars pop in and out against a red background.
hook.text_overlay: DÉJÀ 700 000 JOUEURS DE POKER SUR Betclic

scene_flow: Introduction showing social proof with 700,000 players.
Showcase of different game modes within the Betclic app including Spin & Rush and Tournaments.
In-app gameplay demonstration showing a winning hand and chip animation.
Closing promotional offer for 5 free games with a direct call to action.
on_screen_text: DÉJÀ 700 000 JOUEURS DE POKER SUR Betclic
VIENS TESTER LA ROOM DE POKER D'1 JOUEUR SUR 3 EN FRANCE.
T'ATTENDS QUOI POUR REJOINDRE NOS TABLES ?
audience_proxy: French-speaking adults interested in competitive online poker and social gaming.
